strategyResults.details: eslint on changed files: zero errors.

The 6 failures are all in tests/e2e/cockpit-integration.test.ts (McpError -32000 Connection closed), pre-existing and unmodified by this sprint (git diff HEAD~1 = 0 lines). contract-materialization.test.ts 4/4 pass; run.test.ts 12/12 pass. No regressions.

git diff HEAD~1 confirms verbatim extraction; test asserts title/description/sprintNumber/features/status/successCriteria(verificationMethod agent-evaluation)/precision parity.
helper sets contractId = sprint-<specId>-NN (padStart 2); tests assert listContracts returns sprintNumber order and -09 sorts before -10.

criteriaResults.description: full suite, no regressions in run.test.ts

summary: Sprint 1 passes all five required criteria. materializeContracts is a faithful verbatim extraction of the pre-refactor loop with the sole authorized change being deterministic zero-padded ids; checkpoints remain in pipeline.ts. The 6 cockpit-integration failures are pre-existing infrastructure issues unrelated to this sprint.
